title: Local CJK/Latin entity extraction without shipping a model?
abstract:
I am building a local-first Mac writing app, and I am stuck on the story-memory layer.

The problem: given a long fiction manuscript, I need to extract characters, aliases, relationships, locations, timeline facts, and unresolved plot facts. It has to work reasonably well across CJK and Latin-scrip
abstract_zh: 我正在开发一个本地优先的Mac写作软件，但卡在了“故事记忆层”。别问我为什么叫它“故事记忆层”，因为我就是想让程序员头疼一下。问题是：给个长篇小说，得把人物、别名、关系、地点、时间线和未解情节都揪出来，还得兼顾汉字和拉丁字母。这不就是让我在本地提取实体，却不想分享模型？我呸！
